calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Debrenia Madison; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Andrew Hawkins, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Prime Apartments Properties I, LLC.
Attorney, Paul D. Singer, representing the plaintiff.

Defendants, Erin Dorn and Damien Silva, are present.
Attorney, Jessica M. Tankersley, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of SEP-28-2009 is vacated.
